title: vcenter/create-vm input
description: Input Contract for the vcenter/create-vm Action (ADR-0113): build a VM in vSphere via govmomi. vCenter credentials inject as a CredentialRef at the plugin's own broker (§2.5), never as params.

datacenter.description: target datacenter; empty selects the sole datacenter

guestId.description: vSphere guest OS identifier; empty defaults to otherGuest

projectKind.description: estate overlay (ADR-0058 §6): the Entity kind the built VM projects AS (e.g. host), so a fleet View selects it. Empty keeps the native 'vm'.

projectLabels.description: estate overlay labels carried on the built VM's Run-provenance projection — the stratt.intent/instance correlation key + fleet labels the Run may own (§2.1 per-key ownership).
